meta.title: Pimsleur Spanish Levels 1–2 (unofficial lesson vocab)
meta.source: Brainscape user deck by David Scott

cards.en: Thank you very much. / Thanks a lot.
or (before words beginning with an ‘o’ sound)
I prefer to walk / go on foot.
What a shame! That’s too bad!
we would like / it would please us
I would like / it would please me
You (pl) have to come to visit.
to tell him / to say to him
Do you have books in English?
either (at the end of a sentence)
no one/anyone else (in a negative sentence)
to go out / to go outside
She must be a good student.
I’m going to read it (m) tonight.
it works (for a car or machine)
I’m going to look for it (m).
